title: Chapada do Araripe Deforestation Monitor
description: Open-source deforestation and degradation monitoring system for the Chapada do Araripe protected area (APA) in Brazil. Builds monthly per-pixel baselines from Sentinel-2, Landsat, and Harmonized Landsat Sentinel-2 imagery, then detects anomalies in vegetation moisture (NDMI), burn (NBR), and greenness (EVI2) indices via z-score thresholds with drought-adjusted sensitivity. Designed to be replicable in other regions.
